feature: settings-screen: confirm dialog before regenerate meal plan

prompts.prompt: In components/settings-screen.tsx, add to the existing import list: import { AlertDialog, AlertDialogAction, AlertDialogCancel, AlertDialogContent, AlertDialogDescription, AlertDialogFooter, AlertDialogHeader, AlertDialogTitle } from "@/components/ui/alert-dialog"

prompts.description: Add regenDialogOpen state and split handleRegenerate into open + confirm
prompts.prompt: In components/settings-screen.tsx, inside SettingsScreen(), after the existing useState declarations, add: const [regenDialogOpen, setRegenDialogOpen] = useState(false). Rename the current handleRegenerate body to handleConfirmRegenerate. Rewrite handleRegenerate to only call setRegenDialogOpen(true) (guarded by isGeneratingMealPlan check).

prompts.description: Wrap Regenerate plan button with controlled AlertDialog
prompts.prompt: In components/settings-screen.tsx, wrap the 'Regenerate plan' Button inside an AlertDialog with open={regenDialogOpen} onOpenChange={setRegenDialogOpen}. AlertDialogContent should contain: title 'Regenerate meal plan?', description 'This will replace your current week plan with a new one based on your updated settings.', AlertDialogCancel 'Cancel', AlertDialogAction 'Yes, regenerate' that calls handleConfirmRegenerate().
